about.title: About Janeh by Manoush
about.heroSubtitle: Where Armenian heritage meets contemporary elegance
about.heritageBody: Representing the real Armenian, the origin of Janeh's name has deep patriotic roots. The name 'Janeh' is taken from the Martuni region of Artsakh. In the local dialect, Janeh is equivalent to the word Jan (in translation-sweety). 'Janeh' is silver jewelry, on which Armenian ornaments are depicted, taken from sculptures of khachkars and church domes, Armenian costumes and carpets.
about.quoteText: Our legends tell the rich stories of our ancestors, who are the roots of our art.
about.craftSubtitle: - Jewelry is one of the important accessories that reveals a person's essence. The model, type, and shape of jewelry talks more about the wearer than the shirt or pants he or she is wearing. - Manush Yesayan
about.craftHandicraftBody: Every piece is meticulously handcrafted by skilled artisans, ensuring exceptional quality and attention to detail in each creation.
about.craftDesignBody: Our designs are drawn from tradition and reimagined for today. From sketch to finished piece, we combine classical motifs with modern sensibility.
about.craftCollectionsBody: From delicate everyday pieces to statement jewelry for special occasions, we create collections that become a part of your story.
about.ctaHeading: Inspired by history and culture, jewelry is created that fuses modern style and Armenian culture.

quickLinks.label: Resources
quickLinks.title: Help & information
quickLinks.subtitle: Everything you need to choose, care for, and receive your jewelry.

about.paragraph1: Janeh by Manoush is a handcrafted jewelry brand founded with the belief that every piece of jewelry should tell a story. Our collections are designed with passion, precision, and a deep love for timeless beauty.
about.paragraph2: Each piece is carefully crafted using ethically sourced materials, blending traditional Armenian artistry with contemporary design. From delicate everyday pieces to statement jewelry for special occasions, we create accessories that become a part of your story.
about.paragraph3: We believe in quality over quantity, sustainability, and the power of personal expression through beautiful jewelry.
about.qualityDesc: Crafted by skilled artisans, each piece embodies outstanding quality and refined craftsmanship.
about.sustainabilityDesc: Each piece is thoughtfully created with a distinctive design and a personal touch.
about.expressionDesc: Rooted in Armenian tradition, our designs reflect a balance of heritage, modern aesthetics, and individuality.

ringSizeGuide.title: Ring Size Guide
ringSizeGuide.bullet1: A properly chosen ring size ensures comfort and a natural feel when wearing the ring.
ringSizeGuide.bullet2: You can determine your size using a piece of paper: wrap it around your finger, mark the junction, and measure the resulting length in millimetres. You can also measure the inside diameter of an existing ring for a more accurate result. We recommend measuring at the end of the day, when your finger is at its natural size.
ringSizeGuide.bullet3:
Size guide:

55 mm ≈ size 16
58 mm ≈ size 17
61 mm ≈ size 18
64 mm ≈ size 19
67 mm ≈ size 20
70 mm ≈ size 21
ringSizeGuide.bullet4: Please note that self-measurements may have slight variations. For the most accurate fit, we recommend visiting our store.

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.bullet1: We offer fast and reliable delivery both within Armenia and internationally.
shipping.bullet2: After placing your order, you will receive an email with updates on your order status. Please note that the email may appear in your spam folder. Once your order arrives in your country, the courier will contact you to arrange delivery.
shipping.bullet3: Delivery within Yerevan costs 1,000 AMD. In-stock items are delivered within up to 2 days, while made-to-order pieces are delivered within up to 20 days.
shipping.bullet4: Shipping to Russia takes 7–10 business days, with a delivery cost of 6,000 AMD.
shipping.bullet5: Shipping to the USA takes 7–15 business days, with a delivery cost of 6,000 AMD.
shipping.bullet6: Delivery is carried out door-to-door, directly to your specified address.

returns.title: Returns or Exchanges
returns.bullet1: We value that every purchase is thoughtful and enjoyable.
returns.bullet2: Due to the nature of jewelry, and in accordance with Article 23, Clause 9 of the RA Law “On Consumer Rights Protection”, items made of precious metals, including those with precious, semi-precious, or synthetic stones, are not eligible for return or exchange.
returns.bullet3: We kindly recommend making your selection carefully or contacting us for assistance before completing your purchase.
returns.lawReferenceLabel: Official list on ARLIS — RA Government Decision No. 77 of 30 January 2002 (non-returnable goods of proper quality)

care.title: How to wear silver jewelry?
care.bullet1: Avoid contact with silver jewelry with cosmetics, household chemicals or medicines containing sulfur.
care.bullet2: Remember that silver begins to "get black" from excess moisture, so remove rings, bracelets and earrings when doing housework, taking a bath, or playing sports.
care.bullet3: The best way to store jewelry is to use accessory boxes.
care.bullet4: Avoid impacts that may cause scratches on delicate metal.
care.bullet5: Jewelry should be cleaned regularly with a soft dry cloth.
care.closing: We hope that the above information, as well as your careful treatment of the jewelry, will preserve its original shine and beauty. If, because of wearing the jewelry properly, it will lose its appearance, we are ready to correct all defects, if they are caused by an error in the manufacturing processes.

giftCards.title: Gift Cards
giftCards.bullet1: Give the freedom to choose with our gift cards, starting from 10․000 AMD.
giftCards.bullet2: They are the perfect way to create a thoughtful surprise, allowing the recipient to find the piece that speaks to them most.
giftCards.bullet3: Our gift cards have no expiration date and can be used at any convenient time.
giftCards.bullet4: Please present the gift card in-store when making a purchase.
